articles.description: Chief football writer Phil McNulty examines the state of the Premier League after a disappointing week in Europe for all six of its clubs.
articles.title: Premier League: Six teams, no wins in Champions League last-16 first legs

articles.description: Jude Bellingham stood open mouthed in disbelief while Kylian Mbappe jumped out of his seat to celebrate as Real Madrid team-mate Federico Valverde scored a stunning hat-trick to sink Manchester City in their Champions League first-leg tie.
articles.title: Federico Valverde: Real Madrid's 'most underrated player on the planet' stars against Manchester City

articles.description: A costly error by Chelsea goalkeeper Filip Jorgensen sparks a late collapse as Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's double gives Paris St‑Germain a three‑goal lead going into next week's Champions League last-16 second leg.
articles.title: Paris Saint-Germain 5-2 Chelsea: Kvaratskhelia double as PSG thump Chelsea in first leg

articles.description: "You do it too, eh?". Those were the words from Arsenal's set-piece coach Nicolas Jover to Bayer Leverkusen manager Kasper Hjulmand after the German side scored from a corner in the 1-1 Champions League last-16 first-leg draw between the two sides.
articles.title: Bayer Leverkusen 1-1 Arsenal: Gunners undone by own set-piece weapon

articles.description: Rory McIlroy says he hopes to be able to defend his Players Championship title at TPC Sawgrass after withdrawing from a tournament through injury last week.
articles.title: Players Championship: Rory McIlroy hopeful on Sawgrass after injury

articles.description: Antonin Kinsky thanks those who have sent messages of support after a "nightmare" display in Spurs' Champions League defeat at Atletico Madrid.
articles.title: Antonin Kinsky: Spurs goalkeeper grateful for support after 'nightmare' at Atletico Madrid in Champions League

articles.description: Coaches of Hundred teams with investment from the IPL say they have not been directed away from signing Pakistan players in Thursday's men's auction.
articles.title: The Hundred: Coaches 'not told to avoid Pakistan players' in auction

articles.description: Bodo/Glimt beat Sporting in Norway in first leg of Champions League last-16 tie.
articles.title: Bodo/Glimt 3-0 Sporting- Norwegians in charge of Champions League last-16 tie

articles.description: Pedro Neto apologises for pushing over a ball boy over during Chelsea's 5-2 defeat by Paris St‑Germain in the Champions League.
articles.title: Ball boy push: Chelsea's Pedro Neto apologises for pushing PSG ball boy

articles.description: German cross-country skiers turn their backs on the Russian gold medallists on the Winter Paralympics podium in protest against the nation's inclusion at the Games.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: Germans protest against Russia during medal ceremony
